items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
Talked about this more in the article, but not being ready to host ASW isn’t a huge deal for the Sky’s training facility.

The bigger issue is that players have not had consistent access to courts and rehabilitation resources for close to a month — and the team can’t or won’t give a move-in date.

items.title: The Obama Center will host several major Friday events — including media day — for WNBA All-Star weekend.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
The Obama Center will host several major Friday events — including media day — for WNBA All-Star weekend.

It’s the first use of the new campus for a pro sports event.

But the move also highlights extensive delays to the Sky’s training facility, which was originally slated to host community events.

media.title: Obama Center will host WNBA All-Star events in place of unfinished Chicago Sky facility
media.description: The recently opened Obama Presidential Center will play a major part in WNBA All-Star weekend with the Chicago Sky’s training facility in Bedford Park unavailable.

items.body_excerpt:
July 8, 2003: Cleveland rookie LeBron James makes his NBA Summer League debut at Orlando, finishing with 14 PTS/7 REB/6 AST in a 107-80 win over the Magic in front of 15,123 at TD Waterhouse Centre.

James played 23 minutes in the 40 minute game, shooting 5-11 FG (0-3 3P)/4-4 FT.

items.title: The Wizards remain elite at using trade exceptions before they expire.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Wizards remain elite at using trade exceptions before they expire.

Their $13.4 million trade exception (expires today) fits Deandre Ayton ($8.1 million) & Khris Middleton ($5.6 million) to give him exactly three years, $17.6 million.

This allows them to create two new TPEs.

items.title: [Rich Paul] On LeBron James not wanting to be a third option on the Lakers behind Luka and Austin: “When the coach asks you to do something and play a certain way, he doesn't know how to buck. Obviously I'm not the third option. But if this is what I'm being asked to do, then I'm going to do that.”
